dsl_rule.translation_notes: Signal GUJRAL_DRY_6 translated using bar properties. Entry: upper_wick > body (long top tail) AND body < 0 (red candle) creates the primary bearish rejection setup. The signal mentions green candles or Doji with long top tail as alternatives, but these cannot be cleanly expressed without additional color/doji detection logic. Exit uses simple reversal: close crossing above previous high. Follow-through confirmation is omitted as it requires multi-bar analysis not expressible in single-condition format. Parameters for tail_length threshold set to AUTHOR_SILENT interpretation via relative wick-to-body ratio.

source_rule_text: When a candle has a long top tail (shadow) with a red body, or even a green candle or Doji with a long top tail, treat it as a bearish signal, especially if followed by downside follow-through.
